message.content:
The training process has been running for too long with no output. I need to interrupt it and take a different, faster approach.

{"analysis":"Training has been running too long with no output. Need to interrupt and take a faster approach. I'll use a single config with fewer epochs that can complete in reasonable time.","plan":"1. Send Ctrl+C to interrupt. 2. Run a very quick training with just one config (epoch=25, dim=50) which should complete in about 5 minutes. 3. Quantize and save.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":3.0}]}
